title: centaurea × costei
intro: Centaurea × costei, also known as the hybrid centaury, is a plant species derived from the cross between Centaurea scabiosa and Centaurea cyanus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × costei include its potential to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Centaurea × costei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
